basic_details.job_title: DHS Giridih Recruitment 2026 – 108 NHM Para Medical Posts, Apply Offline Before 12 August
basic_details.post_name: Staff Nurse, ANM, Lab Technician, Pharmacist, Block Data Manager, Rehabilitation Worker and Other Posts
basic_details.short_information: The District Health Society (DHS), Giridih, Jharkhand has published Advertisement No. 03/2026/DHS dated 20.07.2026 inviting applications for recruitment of para medical workers on a contractual basis under the National Health Mission (NHM). The recruitment covers 23 different posts with a total of 108 vacancies, including Staff Nurse, ANM, Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist, Senior Treatment Supervisor, District Pharmacist, Block Data Manager, Rehabilitation Worker, and other health programme posts. Eligible candidates can apply offline by sending their application to the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chi

important_dates.raw: 20 July 2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 12 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM | No other dates (such as exam date, admit card date, or interview date) are mentioned in the official notification.

application_fee.details: General / Other Backward Class / Backward Class candidates: Rs. 400/- per post SC/ST candidates: Rs. 200/- per post The fee must be paid via Demand Draft drawn in favor of "District Rural Health Society, Giridih" (जिला ग्रामीण स्वास्थ्य समिति, गिरिडीह) and enclosed with the application. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and separate fee for each post.

age_limit.details: Category Minimum Age Maximum Age Maximum Age for Divyang (PwD) Unreserved 21 years 35 years 45 years Backward Class / Extremely Backward Class 21 years 37 years 47 years Women (Unreserved/EWS/BC/EBC) 21 years 38 years 48 years SC/ST (Male & Female) 21 years 40 years 50 years EWS 21 years 35 years 45 years

qualification.details: Educational qualification differs post-to-post (see the vacancy table above). Some qualification requirements common across multiple posts include: | ANM posts (NHM, MTC, RBSK, NUHM): 10+2 or equivalent with an ANM course recognized by the Government and approved by the Indian Nursing Council (INC), and registration under the Jharkhand Nursing Council. Staff Nurse posts (NHM, NBSU): 10+2/Intermediate with 3 years of General Nursing and Midwifery training from a Government-recognized institution, registered under the Jharkhand Nursing Council. Several technical/supervisory posts (STS, STLS, TB-HV) additionally require a certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months) and, in some cases, a permanent two-wheeler driving licence. | Preferential/desirable qualifications (such as relevant field experience, NTEP experience, or fluency in local languages) are listed separately for each post in the official notification and are used to give preference, not as mandatory essential qualifications.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification (Summary): Bachelor's Degree OR recognized Sanitary Inspector's course; Computer Operation certificate (min. 2 months); permanent two-wheeler driving licence
Graduate/Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent from a govt. recognized institution; two-wheeler driving licence; computer operations certificate
Intermediate (10+2) and Diploma/Certified course in Medical Laboratory Technology or equivalent
MBA/PG Diploma in Management/Health Administration; at least 1 year work experience
Graduate in Science OR Intermediate (10+2) in Science with MPW/LHV/ANM/Health Worker experience, or TB Health Visitor's recognized course
Degree/Diploma in Pharmacy from a recognized university
Matriculation + ITI in Refrigeration and Air-Conditioning; 3 years' experience in DF/ILR/Refrigerators
PG Degree in Zoology (Entomology) or Life Science (Zoology as one subject at graduate level mandatory for Life Science candidates)
Graduate from recognized university with Biology stream; valid two-wheeler driving licence
10+2 or equivalent with ANM course from an institution recognized by Govt. and approved by INC; registered under Jharkhand Nursing Council
10+2/Intermediate with 3 years' General Nursing and Midwifery training; registered under Jharkhand Nursing Council
Graduation in any discipline with a computer application diploma/degree (as specified); minimum 2 years' post-qualification relevant experience

PG Degree after completion of a minimum 2-year course of study in mental health or psychiatric social work

PG Degree in Psychology/Applied Psychology + M.Phil in medical/social psychology (2-year full-time course with supervised clinical training, RCI recognized)

salary_details.details: Salary is different for each post and ranges from Rs. 8,000/- (Refrigerator Mechanic) to Rs. 43,923/- (VBD Consultant) per month. Refer to the vacancy table above for the exact monthly remuneration of each post.

selection_process: Candidates will be selected based on marks obtained in educational and technical examinations
and/or a Written Test / Skill Test / Interview
whichever is applicable for the respective post. The final merit list will be prepared and published for one week at the office of the Civil Surgeon/Deputy Commissioner
with notice of publication given through newspapers.
how_to_apply: Download/obtain the prescribed application format (Annexure given with the official notification).

Fill in all details: post applied for, name, father's/husband's name, gender, date of birth, educational and training qualifications, work experience, special qualifications, computer qualification, permanent address, correspondence address, DD details, category, driving licence number (if applicable), email ID, and mobile number.
Attach self-attested copies of all required certificates and the passport-size photographs.
Attach the Demand Draft of the requisite application fee in favor of "District Rural Health Society, Giridih."
Enclose a self-addressed envelope of size 24x10 cm.

Send the complete application by Registered Post/Speed Post only to the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Executive Officer, District Health Society, Giridih, so that it reaches on or before 12 August 2026, 5:00 PM.
Applicants must write the post code on both the application and the envelope.

The complete postal address for sending the application is not explicitly printed in the notification beyond the designation "Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Executive Officer, DHS Giridih." Candidates are advised to confirm the full postal address via the official website before dispatching the application.

rows.district_health_society_dhs_giridih_jhar: Staff Nurse, ANM, Lab Technician, Pharmacist, Block Data Manager, Rehabilitation Worker and Other Posts

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: 20 July 2026 Last Date to Submit Application: 12 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM No other dates (such as exam date, admit card date, or interview date) are mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: DHS Giridih Vacancy Details 2026 (Post-wise)
content_sections.text: Below is the complete post-wise vacancy, qualification, preferential qualification, and salary breakup as given in the official notification. Total vacancies across all 23 posts: 108. The notification also provides a category-wise reservation roster for each post (Unreserved, SC, ST, EBC, BC/Extremely Backward, EWS). Key figures for the largest-vacancy posts: Staff Nurse (NHM) – 24 posts: Unreserved 10, SC 3, ST 3, EBC 4, BC 2, EWS 2 ANM (NHM) – 14 posts: Unreserved 6, SC 2, ST 3, EBC 2, EWS 1 Rehabilitation Worker (NPHCE) – 11 posts: Unreserved 5, SC 1, ST 1, EBC 2, BC 1, EWS 1 Senior Treatment Supervisor – 8 posts: Unreserved 6, ST 1, EBC 1 Lab Technician/Sputum Microscopist – 7 posts: Unreserved 4, SC 1, EBC 2 Block Data Manager – 6 posts: Unreserved 2, SC 1, EBC 1, BC 1, EWS 1 For the complete category-wise breakup of all 23 posts, candidates should refer to the official notification PDF , as reproducing the full table here would not add clarity beyond the source document.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility & Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Educational qualification differs post-to-post (see the vacancy table above). Some qualification requirements common across multiple posts include: ANM posts (NHM, MTC, RBSK, NUHM): 10+2 or equivalent with an ANM course recognized by the Government and approved by the Indian Nursing Council (INC), and registration under the Jharkhand Nursing Council. Staff Nurse posts (NHM, NBSU): 10+2/Intermediate with 3 years of General Nursing and Midwifery training from a Government-recognized institution, registered under the Jharkhand Nursing Council. Several technical/supervisory posts (STS, STLS, TB-HV) additionally require a certificate course in computer operations (minimum 2 months) and, in some cases, a permanent two-wheeler driving licence. Preferential/desirable qualifications (such as relevant field experience, NTEP experience, or fluency in local languages) are listed separately for each post in the official notification and are used to give preference, not as mandatory essential qualifications.

content_sections.heading: DHS Giridih Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Salary is different for each post and ranges from Rs. 8,000/- (Refrigerator Mechanic) to Rs. 43,923/- (VBD Consultant) per month. Refer to the vacancy table above for the exact monthly remuneration of each post.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: General / Other Backward Class / Backward Class candidates: Rs. 400/- per post SC/ST candidates: Rs. 200/- per post The fee must be paid via Demand Draft drawn in favor of "District Rural Health Society, Giridih" (जिला ग्रामीण स्वास्थ्य समिति, गिरिडीह) and enclosed with the application. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application and separate fee for each post.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates will be selected based on marks obtained in educational and technical examinations, and/or a Written Test / Skill Test / Interview, whichever is applicable for the respective post. The final merit list will be prepared and published for one week at the office of the Civil Surgeon/Deputy Commissioner, with notice of publication given through newspapers.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required
content_sections.text: Duly filled application in the prescribed format (given at the end of the notification) Self-attested photocopies of all educational and training qualification certificates and mark sheets Caste certificate issued by a competent authority (if claiming reservation benefit) Birth date/Matriculation certificate as proof of date of birth Local residence certificate Self-attested proof of experience certificates, if any (volunteer experience is not considered valid) Valid driving licence certificate, where applicable to the post Two self-attested passport-size color photographs (one affixed to the application) A self-addressed envelope of 24x10 cm Demand Draft for the application fee Candidates using CGPA for educational qualification must also submit the CGPA conversion chart along with the mark sheet

content_sections.heading: How to Apply (Offline Process)
content_sections.text: Download/obtain the prescribed application format (Annexure given with the official notification ). Fill in all details: post applied for, name, father's/husband's name, gender, date of birth, educational and training qualifications, work experience, special qualifications, computer qualification, permanent address, correspondence address, DD details, category, driving licence number (if applicable), email ID, and mobile number. Attach self-attested copies of all required certificates and the passport-size photographs. Attach the Demand Draft of the requisite application fee in favor of "District Rural Health Society, Giridih." Enclose a self-addressed envelope of size 24x10 cm. Send the complete application by Registered Post/Speed Post only to the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Executive Officer, District Health Society, Giridih, so that it reaches on or before 12 August 2026, 5:00 PM . Applicants must write the post code on both the application and the envelope. The complete postal address for sending the application is not explicitly printed in the notification beyond the designation "Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Executive Officer, DHS Giridih." Candidates are advised to confirm the full postal address via the official website before dispatching the application.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DHS Giridih Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is 12 August 2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many total vacancies are there in DHS Giridih Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 108 vacancies across 23 posts including Staff Nurse, ANM, Lab Technician, Senior Treatment Supervisor, District Pharmacist, Block Data Manager, Rehabilitation Worker, and others.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for DHS Giridih NHM Recruitment?
faq.answer: Rs. 400/- for General/OBC/BC candidates and Rs. 200/- for SC/ST candidates, payable by Demand Draft in favor of "District Rural Health Society, Giridih."

faq.question: Q4. Can I apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies that applications must be sent offline by Registered Post/Speed Post to the Civil Surgeon-cum-Chief Executive Officer, DHS Giridih.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for DHS Giridih Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Minimum age is 21 years for all categories. Maximum age ranges from 35 years (Unreserved/EWS) to 40 years (SC/ST), with additional relaxation for women and Divyang (PwD) candidates. See the age limit table above for full details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Staff Nurse post in DHS Giridih Recruitment?
faq.answer: The Staff Nurse (NHM) and Staff Nurse (NBSU) posts carry a salary of Rs. 14,300/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the qualification required for ANM posts in this recruitment?
faq.answer: 10+2 or an equivalent examination along with completion of the ANM course from an institution recognized by the Government and approved by the Indian Nursing Council, and registration under the Jharkhand Nursing Council.

faq.question: Q8. Is there an interview for these posts?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on marks obtained in educational/technical exams and/or Written Test/Skill Test/Interview, whichever is applicable to the respective post, as per the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Can I apply for more than one post in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, but a separate application form and separate application fee must be submitted for each post applied for.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No. This is a contractual engagement under the National Health Mission for one year, extendable annually based on performance appraisal. It does not amount to regular employment.
